name: Boya Mini 1RX USB-C + 1RX Lightning Port + 2TX Wireless Microphone
description: Designed with unmatched portability for the content creator on the go, the black BOYA mini 2-Person Tiny Wireless Microphone System features ultracompact transmitters weighing just 0.2 oz while improving your audio quality in your next vlog or livestream.

features.Key Features: For Content Creation | 2-Person Shoots with Mobile Devices | 2 x Tiny Transmitters with Built-In Mic | 2 x Plug-In Receivers, USB-C & Lightning | 328' Transmission Distance | 48 kHz 16-Bit Audio Sampling Rate | 3-Level Noise Cancellation, 120 dB SPL | Three Voice Changer Modes | 6-Hour Battery Life, Charging Case
features.What’s In The Box: BOYA mini 2-Person Tiny Wireless Microphone System with Lightning & USB-C Connectors for Mobile Devices (2.4 GHz, Black) | 2 x Transmitter | Plug-In Receiver (Lightning) | Plug-In Receiver (USB-C) | Charging Case | USB-C to USB-A Charging Cable | Carrying Pouch
